title: Lapsi - Digital Pediatric Health Platform
problem: Parents of young children lack reliable digital tools for tracking child development and accessing pediatric advice.
solution: Digital platform for child health tracking, vaccination schedules, development milestones, and access to pediatric nurses.
technology: Mobile app, health tracking, chat support
regulatory_notes: Health information app, not medical device.
varden_fit: Moderate — pediatric focus could complement family medicine providers on Varden.
notes: Pediatric digital health. Niche but valuable segment.
